commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates `docs/gateway/openai-http-api.md` with custom client guidance, stable `user` session advice, and a stable-session curl example.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a runtime bug because this is a docs-only PR. The blockers are high-confidence source checks: the live patch fails to apply on current main and the example conflicts with the current model alias contract.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are narrow docs-only repairs that an automated repair lane can attempt if maintainers want to keep the guidance.

target.title: docs: clarify custom mobile client usage for chat completions
target.body:
## Summary
- clarify that `/v1/chat/completions` is the recommended path for a private custom mobile client
- explain when to use the HTTP endpoint vs WebChat/Gateway WebSocket vs a channel plugin
- add a stable-session curl example using `model: "openclaw:main"` and `user`

## Why
The current page explains the endpoint mechanics, but it does not explicitly tell app builders whether they should use this endpoint for a private custom app or build a channel/plugin instead. This fills that gap without changing behavior.

## Testing
- `git diff --check`
- verified internal doc links: `/web/webchat`, `/gateway/protocol`, `/plugins/building-plugins`
- did not run full `pnpm build && pnpm check && pnpm test` in this fresh clone because this is a docs-only change

## AI-assisted
- This PR was prepared with AI assistance.
- I reviewed the final diff and understand the change.
target.author: fpbolivar
